positive: A whimsical and elegant illustration featuring a golden retriever puppy playing happily among stylized constellations and blooming celestial flowers. The puppy should have a clean, friendly silhouette, set against a deep midnight blue background speckled with vibrant nebula dust (magenta, teal, gold). The composition must be centralized, giving a bold, symmetrical feel perfect for a t-shirt print. Incorporate subtle geometric patterns, stylized crescent moons, and shooting star trails that complement the dog's joyful pose. The style should be a harmonious blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern graphic design, executed with crisp vector lines and high contrast, making it visually striking and print-friendly. Volumetric, clean lines, maximalist yet balanced, 8k.
